key.description: Unique identifier for the resource , only characters and numbers are allowed no spaces or special characters

type.description: Type of the resource, where 'standard' is a regular API endpoint, 'extended' is an extension of an existing endpoint with additional rules or mutations, and 'alias' is an alternative path to an existing endpoint

matchCriteria.description: JSON structure defining criteria for matching incoming requests to this resource, such as headers, query parameters, or body content

requestMutation.description: JSON structure defining how to mutate the incoming request data before processing it

responseMutation.description: JSON structure defining how to mutate the response data before sending it back to the client

recordedRequestRaw.description: Raw request data as recorded during request processing, useful for debugging and auditing

recordedRequestParsed.description: Parsed request data for easier access in rules and mutations

blockLegacyPath.description: When true, blocks direct calls to pathPattern. Clients must use the canonical URL /{domain}/{role}/{resourceKey}.
